prompt: Explore this repository and write a STRUCTURE.md at the project root describing its directory layout and what each area is for.
notes: MEASUREMENT, not pass/fail. Same task as p7 but against a ~67-file tree instead of 15, to actually stress context growth (p7 stayed cheap only because the fixture was tiny + read_file truncates at 8k). The value is the recorded iterations + prompt-token growth, feeding the C3 (context-management) work. Compare its token curve against p7's.
